# Fishery Data 

```{r}
#| include: false
rnorm(5)
library(iotcALB)
Hist <- readRDS('../objects/Hist/OM5b.hist')
Data <- Hist@Data[[1]]$Combined
```

The observed fishery data included in the OM are: 

- fleet- and season-specific indices of abundance (CPUE; @fig-data-cpue) 
- fleet- and season-specific catches (@fig-data-catch). 

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-data-cpue
#| fig-cap: "Observed CPUE indices for the six fleets included in the OMs. Each CPUE index has been standardized to mean 1."
PlotCPUE(Data, byFleet = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-data-catch
#| fig-cap: "Observed catch data for the six fleets included in the OMs."
PlotLandings(Data, byFleet = TRUE) + ggplot2::labs(y= 'Catch (t)')
```
